name: Portuguese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the flour, baking powder, and salt, two tablespoons at a time, until all ingredients are incorporated. The dough should be stiff.
4. Form walnut-sized balls from the dough and roll each into a rope about 6 inches long (pencil-width).
5. Arrange the ropes in a ring on a lightly greased baking sheet, pressing the edges together to seal.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Makes approximately 2-3 dozen biscuits.
